trend_text:

    NEW  Seoul → San Francisco  $593.0/pp ($1631 fam)
    NEW  Tokyo → Nashville  $720.0/pp ($1980 fam)

    ↓    Manila → San Francisco  $653.0→$614.0/pp (-6%)

    GONE Seoul → Philadelphia  was $671.0/pp
    GONE Bangkok → Los Angeles  was $698.0/pp
